failures: subscription_plans.stripe_price_id is NULL for all plans (pro_monthly, studio_monthly) — Stripe prices not yet configured in dashboard
subscription_plans has no 'tier' column — tier mapping must be inferred from plan ID

events_handled: checkout.session.completed — upserts subscriptions row, fetches Stripe sub details
customer.subscription.updated — updates status, period dates, cancel_at_period_end
gaps: customer.subscription.created event not explicitly handled (covered by checkout.session.completed)
Does NOT update user_profiles.subscription_tier on tier change — updates subscriptions table only

subscription_plans_table.note: stripe_price_id must be populated with real Stripe price IDs after Stripe dashboard setup

subscriptions_table.tier_sync: subscription tier inferred from plan_id at checkout.session.completed — no automatic user_profiles sync

top_up_credits_rpc.called_by: ai-orchestrator on AI failure refund (partial MVP behaviour — noted in code)

open_items: PAY-WO-05-OPEN-1: Set stripe_price_id in subscription_plans after Stripe dashboard price creation (owner action required)
PAY-WO-05-OPEN-2: Wire top_up_credits RPC call into stripe-webhook on checkout.session.completed so credit balance increases on plan purchase
PAY-WO-05-OPEN-3: Consider syncing user_profiles.subscription_tier from subscriptions table on webhook event
notes: Stripe webhook correctly handles all 4 events. Signature verification implemented. The core gap is that stripe_price_id fields are unpopulated (Stripe dashboard not yet configured) and credit top-up on checkout is not wired — user buys plan but credit_balance_usd stays at 0. This requires Stripe dashboard configuration (owner action) before it can be fully verified end-to-end.
